expo.name: WeSplit
expo.description: Scan receipts, split bills, and track shared expenses with friends and family.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: WeSplit uses your camera to scan receipt photos for line-item extraction.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: WeSplit uses your photo library so you can import receipt images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: WeSplit uses your microphone to capture spoken orders for each person.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: WeSplit converts speech to text so you can assign receipt items by voice.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: WeSplit may save exported receipt breakdown images to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: WeSplit uses your photo library so you can import receipt images.
plugins.cameraPermission: WeSplit uses your camera to scan receipt photos for line-item extraction.

plugins.microphonePermission: WeSplit uses your microphone to capture spoken orders for each person.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: WeSplit converts speech to text so you can assign receipt items by voice.
